---
title: "Git & GitHub"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Instrument+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
:root{--ac:#f97316}
</style>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#07070b;--surface:#0e0e14;--card:#13131a;--card-h:#18181f;
  --border:rgba(255,255,255,.07);--border-h:rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  --t1:#f0eee8;--t2:#8a8a9a;--t3:#45454f;
  --fn-head:'Outfit',sans-serif;--fn-body:'Instrument Sans',sans-serif;--fn-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  --r:12px;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:var(--bg)!important;font-family:var(--fn-body);color:var(--t1)}
#quarto-content{padding:0!important;max-width:100%!important}
nav.navbar,footer,.quarto-title-banner{display:none!important}
a{text-decoration:none}
.page{position:relative;overflow-x:hidden}

/* COMMON BADGE */
.common-banner{
  background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--ac) 8%,transparent);
  border-bottom:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--ac) 20%,transparent);
  padding:.7rem clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.cb-icon{font-size:1rem}
.cb-text{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac)}
.cb-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2)}

/* HERO */
.c-hero{
  min-height:80vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  padding:clamp(4rem,9vw,7rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem) clamp(3rem,5vw,4rem);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 10% 50%,rgba(249,115,22,.07) 0%,transparent 70%),#07070b;
}
.c-hero::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:48px 48px;
  mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 0% 50%,black 0%,transparent 70%);
}
.c-kicker{
  font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;position:relative;z-index:2;
}
.c-kicker::before{content:'';width:22px;height:1.5px;background:var(--ac)}
.c-h1{
  font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,6rem)!important;
  font-weight:900!important;line-height:.97!important;color:var(--t1)!important;
  letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.4em!important;max-width:16ch;position:relative;z-index:2;
}
.hi{color:var(--ac)} .it{font-style:italic;color:var(--t2)}
.c-desc{
  font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.5vw,1.08rem);font-weight:400;
  color:var(--t2);line-height:1.75;max-width:50ch;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative;z-index:2;
}
.c-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:2.8rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-chip{
  font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--t2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--border-h);
  padding:.38rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
}
.c-chip b{color:var(--ac)}
.c-hero-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.btn-ac{
  font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;
  color:#07070b!important;background:var(--ac);
  padding:.95rem 2.3rem;border-radius:6px;transition:all .22s;
  box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(249,115,22,.35);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
}
.btn-ac:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{
  font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;
  color:var(--t2)!important;background:transparent;
  padding:.95rem 2rem;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-h);transition:all .22s;
}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--t1)!important}

/* SHARED SECTIONS */
.s{padding:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto}
.s-alt{background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.s-lbl{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem}
.s-lbl::after{content:'';display:block;height:1px;width:28px;background:var(--ac);opacity:.5}
.s-title{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:.4rem!important;line-height:1.08!important}
.s-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.s-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.97rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:58ch;line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:2.8rem}

/* COMMAND SHOWCASE */
.cmd-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden}
.cmd-card{background:var(--card);padding:1.6rem;transition:background .2s;cursor:default}
.cmd-card:hover{background:var(--card-h)}
.cmd-cat{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block}
.cmd-name{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.cmd-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.cmd-example{
  font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.73rem;
  background:#0a0a0f;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-left:2px solid var(--ac);
  padding:.5rem .8rem;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;color:#a3e635;
  overflow-x:auto;white-space:nowrap;
}

/* ROADMAP */
.roadmap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden}
.r-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .2s;cursor:default}
.r-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.r-row:hover{background:var(--card-h)}
.r-n{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;background:var(--card);color:var(--t3);border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.r-row.r-final .r-n{background:var(--ac);color:#07070b;font-size:.95rem}
.r-b{padding:1.4rem 1.8rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.r-info{flex:1;min-width:180px}
.r-phase{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.25rem;display:block}
.r-title{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:700;font-size:.92rem;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.2rem}
.r-detail{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.5}
.r-wk{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--t3);letter-spacing:.08em;white-space:nowrap}

/* WHY GRID */
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:1.2rem}
.why-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:1.8rem;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s}
.why-card:hover{border-color:var(--ac);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.why-num{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(249,115,22,.12);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.6rem;display:block}
.why-title{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.why-body{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.82rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.65}

/* CTA */
.c-cta{
  text-align:center;padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);
  background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.c-cta::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 50% 100%,rgba(249,115,22,.06) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.cta-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);background:rgba(249,115,22,.1);border:1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.25);padding:.35rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.8rem}
.cta-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ac);animation:pd 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pd{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:.5}}
.c-cta h2{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(2rem,4.5vw,3.2rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin:0 auto 1rem!important;max-width:22ch;line-height:1.08!important;position:relative;z-index:1}
.c-cta h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.c-cta p{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:1rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:46ch;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;line-height:1.7;position:relative;z-index:1}
.cta-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;justify-content:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
@media(max-width:640px){.c-hero{padding:4rem 1.5rem 2.5rem}.s{padding:3rem 1.5rem}}
</style>

<div class="page">

<!-- common banner -->
<div class="common-banner">
  <span class="cb-icon">🔁</span>
  <span class="cb-text">Mandatory Foundation</span>
  <span class="cb-desc">This course is required before starting any other track. All students begin here.</span>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="c-hero">
  <div class="c-kicker">Common Track · Foundation</div>
  <h1 class="c-h1">
    Git &amp;<br>
    <span class="hi">GitHub</span><br>
    <span class="it">for everyone.</span>
  </h1>
  <p class="c-desc">Version control is not optional. Git is the language every developer speaks — and GitHub is where your work lives, gets reviewed, and gets hired. Start here, regardless of what you plan to build.</p>
  <div class="c-meta">
    <span class="c-chip">⏱ Duration <b>2 Weeks</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">👥 Level <b>All Levels</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">📦 Projects <b>3 Real Repos</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">✅ Required <b>Before All Courses</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="c-hero-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Enroll Now →</a>
    <a href="#curriculum" class="btn-ghost">View Curriculum</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY GIT -->
<section class="s-alt">
  <div class="s">
    <div class="s-lbl">Why This First</div>
    <h2 class="s-title">Version control is the<br><em>first professional skill.</em></h2>
    <p class="s-desc">Every other course involves code. That code needs to be tracked, backed up, collaborated on, and shipped. Git is how that happens. Employers expect it from day one.</p>
    <div class="why-grid">
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-num">01</span><div class="why-title">Never Lose Work Again</div><div class="why-body">Git creates a complete history of every change. Roll back mistakes, compare versions, and work fearlessly knowing you can always recover.</div></div>
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-num">02</span><div class="why-title">Collaborate Like a Pro</div><div class="why-body">Branching and merging let multiple people work on the same project simultaneously — without overwriting each other. This is how every real team works.</div></div>
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-num">03</span><div class="why-title">GitHub is Your Portfolio</div><div class="why-body">Every project you build in every other course goes on GitHub. Recruiters look at your commit history. A green contribution graph speaks louder than a resume.</div></div>
      <div class="why-card"><span class="why-num">04</span><div class="why-title">CI/CD and Automation</div><div class="why-body">GitHub Actions lets your code test, build, and deploy itself. You'll use it in the AWS and Web Development courses — but it starts here.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- COMMANDS -->
<div class="s" id="curriculum">
  <div class="s-lbl">Core Commands</div>
  <h2 class="s-title">What You'll <em>Master</em></h2>
  <p class="s-desc">You won't just memorise commands — you'll understand why each one exists and build muscle memory through real projects.</p>
  <div class="cmd-grid">
    <div class="cmd-card">
      <span class="cmd-cat">Setup &amp; Init</span>
      <div class="cmd-name">Repository Basics</div>
      <div class="cmd-desc">Create repos, configure identity, understand the working tree, staging area, and commit history.</div>
      <div class="cmd-example">git init · git clone · git config</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-card">
      <span class="cmd-cat">Daily Workflow</span>
      <div class="cmd-name">Add, Commit, Push</div>
      <div class="cmd-desc">Stage changes selectively, write meaningful commit messages, and push to remote repositories.</div>
      <div class="cmd-example">git add · git commit · git push</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-card">
      <span class="cmd-cat">Branching</span>
      <div class="cmd-name">Branches &amp; Merging</div>
      <div class="cmd-desc">Feature branches, merge strategies (fast-forward vs three-way), resolving conflicts, and rebase basics.</div>
      <div class="cmd-example">git branch · git merge · git rebase</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-card">
      <span class="cmd-cat">Collaboration</span>
      <div class="cmd-name">Pull Requests &amp; Reviews</div>
      <div class="cmd-desc">Fork workflows, opening PRs, reviewing code, requesting changes, and squash merges.</div>
      <div class="cmd-example">gh pr create · git fetch · git pull</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-card">
      <span class="cmd-cat">History &amp; Debugging</span>
      <div class="cmd-name">Log, Diff &amp; Blame</div>
      <div class="cmd-desc">Navigate commit history, compare file versions, find who changed what and when using git blame and bisect.</div>
      <div class="cmd-example">git log · git diff · git blame</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-card">
      <span class="cmd-cat">Advanced</span>
      <div class="cmd-name">Stash, Tags &amp; GitHub Actions</div>
      <div class="cmd-desc">Temporarily stash work, tag releases, and write a basic CI pipeline that runs tests on every push.</div>
      <div class="cmd-example">git stash · git tag · gh workflow</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ROADMAP -->
<section class="s-alt">
  <div class="s">
    <div class="s-lbl">2-Week Schedule</div>
    <h2 class="s-title">Session <em>by</em> Session</h2>
    <p class="s-desc">Compact, intensive, and immediately applicable. By the end of week two, every other course will feel natural because you already know how to manage your code.</p>
    <div class="roadmap">
      <div class="r-row"><div class="r-n">W1</div><div class="r-b"><div class="r-info"><span class="r-phase">Week 1 · Core Git</span><div class="r-title">Local Git Mastery</div><div class="r-detail">init, add, commit, diff, log, stash, branching, and merging on your local machine</div></div><div class="r-wk">Sessions 1–3</div></div></div>
      <div class="r-row"><div class="r-n">W2</div><div class="r-b"><div class="r-info"><span class="r-phase">Week 2 · GitHub</span><div class="r-title">Remote Repos, PRs &amp; GitHub Actions</div><div class="r-detail">Push to GitHub, fork, open a PR, review code, and write your first CI/CD workflow</div></div><div class="r-wk">Sessions 4–6</div></div></div>
      <div class="r-row r-final"><div class="r-n">✦</div><div class="r-b"><div class="r-info"><span class="r-phase">Capstone</span><div class="r-title">Collaborative Project Submission</div><div class="r-detail">Work in pairs on a shared repo — branch, PR, review and merge. Your first open-source style contribution.</div></div><div class="r-wk">End of Week 2</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="c-cta">
  <div class="cta-badge"><span class="cta-dot"></span>Required · Start Here</div>
  <h2>Your code deserves<br>a <em>proper home.</em></h2>
  <p>Git &amp; GitHub is the foundation every course builds on. Enroll in this track first — it takes two weeks and pays off for the rest of your career.</p>
  <div class="cta-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Book First Session →</a>
    <a href="learn.qmd" class="btn-ghost">← Back to All Courses</a>
  </div>
</section>

</div>
```
